title: eragrostis surreyana
intro: Eragrostis surreyana, also known as Surrey grass, is a type of grass species native to Western Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Eragrostis surreyana include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Eragrostis surreyana typically involve drying and processing the plant material to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
